query: SELECT id, heroHand, heroPosition, spotType, lesson, reviewed, effectiveStackBb, createdAt FROM hands WHERE (tagsJson IS NULL OR tagsJson = 'NULL') AND DATE(createdAt) IN ('2026-04-30', '2026-05-11') ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
